note: Tim-90s POSED holding an open laptop with bright green code on the inner screen and a matte-black lid back. Used ONLY as a base for the laptop-hack core animation. Original pose IS Tim-with-laptop (not standing) — the laptop-hack seam-locks both first and last frames to this pose so the animation loops cleanly back to the held pose. The arrival→core seam is intentionally violated: Tim 'suddenly' has a laptop when the core starts. Accepted as a known cost of using a pose-anchored variant rather than relying on pure prompt-painted clamshell rendering, which produced an unconvincing flat green rectangle in the first attempt.

laptop-hack.note: Tim holds open laptop throughout, types with subtle motion variations across frames. Laptop is a clear clamshell with green-glowing inner screen and matte-black lid back (this is the fix that made laptop-hack work — pose-anchored base instead of prompt-painted clamshell). Motion is more 'engaged typing hold' than a sharply-staged Enter-stab climax; if a punchier mid-animation moment is needed later, regenerate this sheet (5 credits).
